name: pufETH
redeem: pufETH can be withdrawn through Puffer into WETH. Puffer documents an instant 1-step withdrawal using its liquidity vault with a 1% fee, or a fee-free 2-step standard withdrawal that may take around 14 days if validator or EigenLayer withdrawal processes are needed.
notes: Native liquid restaking token for ETH deposited into Puffer; exposure includes Ethereum staking plus EigenLayer/restaking mechanics and related smart-contract/slashing complexity.
